📖 Dashboard Help & Definitions

📊 Global Filters

Character: Filter runs by the character you played (Ironclad, Silent, Defect, Necrobinder, Regent).

Min Ascension: Show only runs at this ascension level or higher (0–10). "5+" shows all Asc 5–10 combined.

Outcome: Filter by Wins, Losses, or All runs.

Mode: Filter by player count — 1P (solo), 2P, 3P, 4P, or All.

🗂️ Tab Groups

GroupTabsPurpose
RunOverview · Ascension · RunsRun-level summaries and history
DeckCards · Relics · Potions · SynergiesWhat you drafted and how it performed
CombatEncounters · Heatmap · BuildsFight outcomes, pick patterns, archetypes
MapFloors · AncientsPer-floor stats and act-start blessings
AnalysisELOCard strength rankings by character

📊 Overview

Win rate by ascension level and character. Deck size targets based on winning runs.

📈 Ascension

Difficulty Curve: Win rate as ascension increases — shows which levels are hardest.

Per-Ascension Table: Runs, wins, avg deck size, avg relics, and deadliest encounter per level.

📋 Runs

Individual run history table. Shows date, character, ascension, outcome, deck size, relics, damage taken, and allies (multiplayer).

Includes a cumulative win-rate trend chart with Kalman-smoothed line.

Allies: In multiplayer runs, shows the characters your teammates played.

🃏 Cards

Pick Rate: How often this card appeared in your final deck (%).

Skip Rate: How often you were offered this card but didn't take it.

Win %: Win rate of runs where you ended up with this card.

Deck %: Average share of your final deck this card represented.

Per-Act Win %: Win rate when the card was first picked in Act 1, 2, or 3.

Starter cards (Strike, Defend, character starters), Curses, and Status cards are excluded.

✨ Relics

Pick Rate: How often this relic appeared in your final loadout.

Win %: Win rate of runs where you had this relic.

ELO: Relic strength estimate, rated vs a 1500 baseline by run outcomes.

Starting relics (Burning Blood, Ring of the Snake, Cracked Core, Bound Phylactery, Divine Right) are excluded.

🧪 Potions

Offered / Picked / Used / Discarded: Lifecycle counts per potion type across all runs.

Shows which potions you find most useful (high used/picked ratio).

🔗 Synergies

Card and relic pairs that appear together in winning decks. Bubble size = frequency. Look for combos with high win rates and multiple occurrences.

⚔️ Encounters

Survivor Rate: % of times you defeated this enemy.

Avg Damage: Average HP lost per fight against this enemy.

Times Ended Run: How many times this enemy was the final fight of a losing run.

Act Breakdown: Survival rates split by act (1, 2, 3).

🔥 Heatmap

Card picks per act, visualised as a Character × Ascension heatmap. Color: Red = low win rate → Character color → Green = high win rate. Numbers show win rate % per cell.

🎭 Builds

Build archetypes grouped by character × ascension. Shows the most common cards and relics in winning runs at each difficulty.

🗺️ Floors

Per-floor statistics aggregated by Floor Type × Act Name × Act Index × Version.

Floor Types: Weak (easy fight), Normal (standard fight), Elite, Boss, Event, Rest, Shop, Treasure, Ancient.

Act: The act name (Overgrowth, Underdocks, Hive, Glory…) — useful for comparing acts across different versions.

Act Index: Position in the run (1 = first act, 2 = second, 3 = third).

Death%: % of runs that ended on this floor. Color: Red ≥ 10%, Gold ≥ 3%.

🌟 Ancients

Blessings offered by ancients at the start of each act (Neow in Act 1, act-specific ancients in Acts 2 & 3).

ELO: Blessing strength rated by run outcomes. Only updates when the blessing was chosen.

Pick%: How often you chose this blessing when it was offered.

Win%: Win rate of runs where you took this blessing.

Filter by Act (1/2/3) or by specific ancient to compare blessings within a pool.

🏆 ELO

Card ELO ratings by character. Dynamic K-factor (48 → 32 → 24 over time), ascension-scaled, and damage-weighted result scoring.

Peak ELO: Highest rating ever reached — indicates upside even if recent form has dropped.

Act Win%: Win rate specifically when this card was first picked in Act 1, 2, or 3.

Skipped: How many times this card was offered but not taken (red highlight = frequently skipped).

❓ Multiplayer

2P/3P/4P runs include allies. The Allies column in Runs shows which characters your teammates played. All stats reflect only your own character's performance.

💡 Tips

  • Click any table column header to sort; click again to reverse.
  • Use Min Ascension slider to see aggregated stats across a difficulty range (e.g. Asc 5+).
  • ELO stabilises with more data — cross-check with Win% and Pick Rate for newer cards.
  • Floors tab + Act filter is useful for comparing how dangerous Act 2 is vs Act 3 at the same floor type.
  • Ancients tab Act filter lets you compare blessing quality across the three ancient pools independently.
